subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth for a people who understand, and verily it is a revelation from God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یعقلون و انها لتنزیل من لدی الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
